mapper.insert: insert into `risk_prediction`(student_id, course_id, risk_probability, risk_label, risk_level, warning_color, main_reason, model_version, predict_time, create_time) values (#{studentId}, #{courseId}, #{riskProbability}, #{riskLabel}, #{riskLevel}, #{warningColor}, #{mainReason}, #{modelVersion}, #{predictTime}, #{createTime})
